"[17] 1021 TO PERFORMANCE TOW // THEY HAVE NOT GOTTEN THE CALL YET // CPZ CHP IS CURRENTLY LL W/3A AND WILL 1023 FOR THE INFO // ETA IS GOING TO BE APPX 90 MIN"

"[16] A37-605 CAN YOU REACH OUT TO 3A THE RP ADV THEY STARTED THEM - IF THEYRE ABLE TO RESP TO THIS ADV THEM MOD FE DMG IS DOWN AN EMBANKMENT IN A DITCH ABOUT 50 FT OFF RDWY / 3A NUMBER IS 4290050249778719"

"[10] RP WILL BE MAKING OWN ARRANGEMENTS FOR 1185 VIA 3A"
